name: Pecan Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix powdered sugar, shortening, and margarine in a large bowl thoroughly. Stir in 1-1/2 cups flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt until well combined.
2. Press the mixture firmly into a rectangular dish measuring 11 X 7 X 1-1/2 inches. Microwave uncovered on high for 4 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn after 2 minutes, until no longer doughy.
3. Mix remaining ingredients in another bowl. Spread over the hot layer and microwave uncovered for an additional 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn after 3 minutes. Allow to cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar.
4. Cut into about 3 X 1-inch bars. Yield: 28 bars; Calories per bar: 145.
